tagline: Trip slots, pantry listings, and open requests—one peer map.

hero.body: List spare suitcase capacity on trips you already take, share odds-and-ends from home in a 5 km cell, or post what you want so matching trips and listings can find you. Same city-first map, clear profiles, chat that leads to a practical handoff.

home.editorialTitle: Three ways to trade, one network.
home.editorialBody: Trip offers with reservable slots, open requests, and nearby pantry listings share the same discovery grid. Someone next door may want what you brought in a tote; someone on a route you fly may sell the spare kilo in checked luggage. Introductions first—settlement stays between you until regulated payments ship.
home.pillar1Body: Discovery is built around cities, corridors, and handoff points—not only a country flag on a map.
home.pillar2Body: Publish spare luggage capacity on trips you already take, or post a request so trips and listings can match. Pantry trades still use a finder’s fee label; trip slots use an agreed per-slot fee. Fixed prices first; competitive bids when we can ship them cleanly.
home.pillar3Body: You agree terms in chat and settle in person or off-platform unless and until regulated in-app payments arrive. We never hold your money today.
home.ctaBandBody: Share what you brought, post a request, or get ready to publish trip capacity as those flows roll out—always within a 5 km cell of where you are so handoffs stay practical.

country.intro: Bring a taste of {country} to your doorstep.

empty.listings: No one's posted nearby — be the first to share your stash.
empty.requests: No open requests in your radius. Quiet for now.

kpi.stripFootnote: These numbers describe the curated catalog seed (and optional demo tiles), not live GMV or signups.

mobile.onboardingSubtitle: The same story on web, admin, and here — tuned for thumbs.
mobile.onboardingDiscoverBody: Browse countries and listings in your radius — pins stay inside a 5 km cell.
mobile.onboardingShareBody: Post what you brought back from home with a small finder’s fee for pickup—trips use a separate agreed slot fee when you publish capacity.
mobile.onboardingMeetBody: Message in-app, agree on a café or station, settle in person. We never touch the cash.
mobile.todaySubtitle: Real listings within a 5 km cell of where you are. Pull to refresh.
mobile.emptyHint: Be the first to share — or post a request and we'll ping you when a matching listing or trip offer lands.

profilePanel.gdprBody: You can export everything we hold or delete your account at any moment.
